description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for PG-191 (Module Settings - Tasks). The route apps/web/src/app/tasks/(list)/task-settings/page.tsx exists only as a 16-line 'coming soon' stub with no tests. All persistence/form/validator/router code is greenfield: no TaskSettings Prisma model, no task-settings validators, no taskSettings router, no TaskSettingsContent/section components, and no colocated tests. Baseline coverage for every in-scope changed line is therefore 0%.
command: Baseline: no prior test coverage exists for any in-scope file. After capture: pnpm --filter <pkg> test --coverage across packages/validators, apps/api, apps/web targeting the new task-settings surfaces.

baseline_totals.note: Zero coverage for in-scope files pre-implementation. New TDD test files drive coverage to >=80% on changed lines (Sonar new_coverage gate).
